name: White Fox | Ami Han
description:
"Now, you will answer all my questions like a good baby, okay?" ❤︎⁠

Update: Since she dropped, here is the card updated with a better image and example dialogue plus improved personality and whatever, I don't know. Bug me enough and I might do Black Cat. Probably when Season 7.5 gets closer. (Also, like my Dolce card, if I find the time I might do a NSFW gallery if enough people like this.)

Old: Since White Fox was just announced for Marvel Rivals, I wanted to throw something together quickly so the fans don't have to starve while waiting for her official release. This bot is heavily based on her comic book lore combined with the details from the recent Dev Vision. I might update her card and scenario once Season 7 actually drops and we get more in-game lore, voice lines, and interactions for her. But for now, go wild.
creator: YarnKnittedKirby
